task_completion.description: Verify the Entrance Camera is configured according to Tier 1 policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface or API commands (e.g., curl, Python) configuring the 'Entrance Camera' to 25 FPS, 4096 kbps, High Quality, and an 'Always' (24/7) recording schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the Parking Lot Camera is configured according to Tier 2 policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface or API commands configuring the 'Parking Lot Camera' to 15 FPS, 2048 kbps, Normal Quality, and an 'Always' (24/7) recording schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lobby Camera is configured according to Tier 2 policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface or API commands configuring the 'Lobby Camera' to 15 FPS, 2048 kbps, Normal Quality, and an 'Always' (24/7) recording schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the Server Room Camera is configured according to Tier 3 policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface or API commands configuring the 'Server Room Camera' to 10 FPS, 1024 kbps, Low Quality, and an 'Always' (24/7) recording schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the compliance report contains the required camera details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a terminal (e.g., using cat) or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/recording_policy_report.txt'. The file must list all four cameras along with their Name, Tier, FPS, Bitrate, and Stream Quality.

task_completion.description: Verify the compliance report calculates the Total Daily Storage estimate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the final line of the report calculating the Total Daily Storage estimate in GB. The value should be approximately 94.92 GB.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the Nx Witness system to configure the cameras.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine interaction with the Nx Witness Web Admin GUI (at localhost:7001) or valid API requests (curl/Python) being executed in the terminal, rather than the agent just writing the report without applying the settings.

integrity.description: Verify the report is saved at the correct absolute path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or editor paths confirming the file is saved exactly at '/home/ga/recording_policy_report.txt', not just printed to standard output or saved in a temporary location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake API responses or GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that any terminal output showing API success responses comes from actually executing a command, and not from the agent simply echoing text to make it look like a success.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- The expected Total Daily Storage estimate is approximately 94.92 GB (acceptable range is 89.9 to 99.9 GB).
- The report must be located at /home/ga/recording_policy_report.txt.
- Camera configurations:
  * Entrance Camera: Tier 1, 25 fps, 4096 kbps, high quality
  * Parking Lot Camera: Tier 2, 15 fps, 2048 kbps, normal quality
  * Lobby Camera: Tier 2, 15 fps, 2048 kbps, normal quality
  * Server Room Camera: Tier 3, 10 fps, 1024 kbps, low quality
